title: CRISPR-Cas systems and methods for altering expression of gene products
abstract: Methods and compositions for altering expression of gene products using engineered CRISPR-Cas systems in eukaryotic cells, including guide RNA and Cas9 nuclease components.

title: Methods and compositions for RNA-directed target DNA modification and for RNA-directed modulation of transcription
assignee: University of California / University of Vienna
abstract: A method of modifying a target DNA using a Cas9 polypeptide and a single-molecule guide RNA to introduce site-specific double-strand breaks for genome editing.

title: Methods of modifying a target nucleotide sequence with a CRISPR/Cas9 system
abstract: Compositions and methods for genome editing in mammalian cells using CRISPR/Cas9 with paired nickases to reduce off-target effects.

title: Base editing of nucleobases without double-stranded DNA cleavage
abstract: Fusion proteins combining a catalytically impaired Cas domain with a deaminase enable precise base editing without introducing double-strand breaks, for therapeutic correction of point mutations.

title: Prime editing compositions and methods for precise genome editing
abstract: A prime editor comprising a Cas nickase fused to a reverse transcriptase and a prime editing guide RNA installs targeted insertions, deletions, and substitutions without double-strand breaks.

title: Lipid nanoparticle delivery of CRISPR-Cas for in vivo hepatic gene editing
abstract: Lipid nanoparticle formulations delivering Cas9 mRNA and guide RNA to the liver for in vivo knockout of the TTR gene to treat transthyretin amyloidosis.

title: Glucagon/GLP-1 agonists for the treatment of obesity
abstract: GLP-1/glucagon dual-agonist peptides for the treatment of metabolic diseases such as obesity and type 2 diabetes.

title: GIP/GLP1 agonist compositions
abstract: GIP/GLP-1 co-agonist peptide compositions useful in the treatment of type 2 diabetes, obesity, and related metabolic disorders.

title: Machine translation using neural network models
abstract: Neural machine translation performed with attention-based transformer neural network models that map source-language sequences to target-language sequences.

title: Methods for online language learning using artificial intelligence and avatar technologies
abstract: Language tutoring modules built on attention-based transformer networks such as GPT and BERT to generate and assess natural-language interactions.

title: Sulfide solid electrolyte material, lithium solid-state battery, and method for producing sulfide solid electrolyte material
abstract: A sulfide solid electrolyte material with high lithium-ion conductivity for all-solid-state lithium batteries, and a method for producing it.

title: Method of forming solid state electrolyte having high lithium ion conduction and battery incorporating same
abstract: A method of forming a solid-state electrolyte film with high lithium-ion conduction and a solid-state battery incorporating the electrolyte.

title: Humanoid robot and walking control method thereof
abstract: A humanoid robot that servo-controls the torque of joint motors for stable bipedal walking using zero-moment-point and finite-state-machine control methods.

title: Foot for humanoid robot
abstract: A robot foot with a motorized, independently actuated toe joint that improves propulsion and reduces the energy required for bipedal walking.

title: Direct air capture device
abstract: A cyclic adsorption/desorption device that captures carbon dioxide from ambient air on amine-functionalized solid sorbent materials.

title: Method for producing a moisture swing sorbent for carbon dioxide capture from air
abstract: A moisture-swing sorbent for capturing carbon dioxide directly from air and regenerating it through changes in humidity.

title: Physical-layer quantum error suppression for superconducting qubits in quantum computation and optimization
abstract: Physical-layer error suppression that enables superconducting qubit technology to approach the low error rates required for quantum fault tolerance.

title: Modular array of vertically integrated superconducting qubit devices for scalable quantum computing
abstract: Modular arrays of vertically integrated superconducting qubit chips assembled into scalable quantum processors compatible with surface-code error correction.

title: Magnetic field plasma confinement for compact fusion power
abstract: Internal and encapsulating magnetic coils maintain a magnetic wall that confines plasma to enable a compact magnetic-confinement fusion reactor.

title: Tokamak reactor for treating fertile material or waste nuclear by-products
abstract: A tokamak reactor that magnetically confines plasma to produce nuclear fusion reactions for transmuting fertile material or waste nuclear by-products.

title: Nucleic acid vaccines
abstract: Ribonucleic acid vaccines in which an mRNA component encodes an antigen derived from an infectious microorganism, formulated for in vivo delivery.

title: Nucleic acid vaccines
abstract: Nucleic acid vaccines comprising RNA polynucleotides having an open reading frame encoding antigenic polypeptides for in vivo administration.
